---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature.

## Problem or Motivation

What problem does this solve? What use case does it enable? Is this related to an existing limitation?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature and how it would work. Include:

- What the user/agent experience would look like
- Which components would be affected (orchestrator, frontend, store, MCP layer, etc.)
- Any API or schema changes needed

## How It Fits the Vision

AitherOS is built around the idea of a genuine multi-agent team. How does this feature make agents feel more collaborative, capable, or observable?

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you considered and why you prefer this one.

## Additional Context

Mockups, diagrams, or references to similar implementations elsewhere.
